name: Decoline
message: DecolineSince 1990, Decoline has been active as a producer and distributor of user-friendly, high-quality curtain-hanging systems.Unique and complete professional window decoration solutions are also part of its assortment. Thanks to constant product and service innovations, and because of its top-class quality standards, the company is a leading player in the window decoration market. At the end of 2019, the company was taken over by investment group Renardmont. This enabled Decoline to pursue its independent course, and to continue to focus on innovation and growth.With a team of more than 45 employees, Decoline realises more than 70% of its sales from its own developments, operating from its headquarters in Pelt (Belgium).Geo: Belgium - Leak size: 85 GB Archive - Contains: Files
